class.name: SiEffectCompressor
class.brief_description: Feed-forward stereo compressor with soft knee, peak/RMS blend detector, and gain-reduction metering.
class.description: A proper feed-forward compressor suitable for track inserts, bus processing, and creative parallel compression. Uses atomic parameters (lock-free on the audio thread), one-pole gain smoothing, and a stereo-linked detector.

method.name: set_params
method.description: Sets all compressor parameters. [param threshold_db] Compression threshold in dB (-60 to 0). [param ratio] Compression ratio (1:1 to 20:1). [param attack_ms] Attack time in milliseconds (0.1 to 100). [param release_ms] Release time in milliseconds (10 to 1000). [param knee_db] Soft knee width in dB (0 for hard knee, up to 24). [param makeup_db] Output makeup gain in dB (-24 to +24). [param mix] Dry/wet mix (0.0 fully dry, 1.0 fully wet). [param detector_blend] Detector blend (0.0 pure peak, 1.0 pure RMS).

method.name: get_gain_reduction_db
method.description: Returns the current gain reduction in dB (positive value). Useful for metering.
